Description: Panel-mount DC barrel jack, 5.5 mm OD / 2.1 mm ID, center positive
Notes: Service-endcap DC input from external Triad WSU240-0750 +24VDC regulated wall adapter; same mounting hole/hardware as prior PJ-005B
Series reverse-polarity protection at DC input
Belt-and-suspenders short protection at DC input; captured schematic and fab BOM use the SMD MSMF110, not the earlier radial MF-R100 (docs corrected 2026-07-04)

Description: 220 uF / 50 V low-ESR electrolytic, D10/P5 radial
Notes: Bulk input cap after protection network; 50 V class REQUIRED on the +24 V input (25 V EEU-FR1E221 superseded by 2026-07-04 pre-order review). Buy 2x: also used as PS500 Cin (schematic C509, URA datasheet requires 50 V Cin; 220 uF > 100 uF minimum is acceptable input bulk)

Description: Isolated DC-DC, 9-36V in (24V nominal), +/-15V dual at 10W out
Notes: Primary +/-15V generation; URA dual-output variant per datasheet-cache correction; RECOM REC10-2415DZ/H1/A/M or XP JTD1024S15 approved alternates
Post-ferrite bulk on +/-15VA rails only; 25 V is fine on the 15 V rails. Do NOT use these on the +24 V input side - the input Cin position needs the 50 V part (see C500 row)
Split-rail board power outputs to audio boards
